Bash(sqlcmd -S 115.84.178.66 -d DELTASOFT -U delta.erp -P 'khsd89#$\)?h>24' -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT Id, FeeCode, FeeName, ParentId, [Level], Status, IsInvoiceInput FROM FeeCodes WHERE FeeCode='05' AND [Level]=1;" -W -s "|")
Bash(unzip -p "Điều chỉnh bảng chấm công 2.docx" word/document.xml)
